content: Case result cards use modal expand on click — layoutId animation with blur backdrop
Animated counters on dollar amounts — count up from 0 when scrolled into view, fire once only
Loading splash screen on first visit only — CRA logo + progress bar, 2s duration, sessionStorage flag 'cra_loaded'
Card hover: whileHover={{ y: -4 }} with blue glow box-shadow
Page transitions: fade + slide up on mount via PageTransition wrapper
Stagger children at 0.1s intervals, delay children 0.1s
